rationale: Snapshot of the gateway trajectory / QA capture hook contract. Main gateway surfaces must keep both trajectory_id assignment and QA capture middleware, and the QA middleware must still terminate in Service.CaptureFromContext so request evidence remains on by default. v3 adds the upstream-request divergence contract: the gateway must keep stashing the final (post-rewrite) upstream request body under the ops_upstream_request_body gin key, and the qa consumer must keep reading it by the identical duplicated literal.

required_file_hooks.rationale: qa capture reads this gin key by duplicated literal (qa cannot import service without an import cycle); renaming the key here silently kills upstream-request divergence capture for traj opt-in records
consumer-side duplicate of OpsUpstreamRequestBodyKey plus the CaptureFromContext hook; either disappearing silently drops request.upstream_body / upstream_divergent from opt-in blobs
pre-flight stash of the final upstream request body on the native anthropic path; an upstream merge dropping this call disables both ops_error_logs body context and traj divergence capture
